mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id IN
#{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DISTINCT sys_permission.* FROM sys_user LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ON sys_user.user_id = sys_user_role.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role ON sys_user_role.role_id = sys_role.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_role_permission ON sys_role.role_id = sys_role_permission.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_permission ON sys_role_permission.permission_id = sys_permission.permission_id WHERE sys_user.user_name = #{username}
